description_long: This is a translucent green plastic bottle with a white pump dispenser on top, designed for dispensing liquid hand sanitizer. The front label displays the ParaMed brand, a blue and white color scheme, and product information including the words 'Instant Hand Sanitizer' and a graphic of a hand. The bottle has a rounded rectangular shape with gently sloping shoulders and a flat base for stability. The pump mechanism is cylindrical and features a horizontal spout for easy dispensing. The back of the bottle is plain, with no visible graphics or text. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and functional, suitable for public or personal use in urban environments.
description: A translucent green plastic bottle with a white pump dispenser and a branded label, designed for dispensing hand sanitizer.
description_view_0: Front view showing the ParaMed label, product information, and a graphic of a hand on the green bottle with a white pump.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the bottle's slim profile and the protruding pump mechanism, with label details barely visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain green back of the bottle with no visible graphics or text, and the white pump top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the bottle's narrow edge and the pump's side profile.
